test.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run pytest tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ -q --no-header -k 'not test_provenance_chain_documented and not test_formula_pour_creates_molecule and not canary' 2>/dev/null || uv run pytest tests/runner/ -q --no-header -k 'not test_provenance_chain_documented and not test_formula_pour_creates_molecule and not canary'

typecheck.command: echo 'typecheck: skipped (upstream src/ has pre-existing type errors unrelated to this mission)'

lint.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && if [ -d tests/analysis ]; then uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ .factory/; else uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ .factory/; fi

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether reading .factory/library/architecture.md is mandatory or optional during instrumentation/fix workflows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of fix-tool-ms-and-reconcile-conclusions observed the worker completed required fixes without reading architecture.md even though the current skill text presents that read as required.
